'''dhanguzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromathematician|iatromathematician]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromathematician|iatromathematician]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhanguzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængizhith|dhængizhith]] || [[word:dhængizhij|dhængizhij]] || [[word:dhængizhish|dhængizhish]] || [[word:dhængizhi|dhængizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangunguzhuth|dhangunguzhuth]] || [[word:dhangunguzhuj|dhangunguzhuj]] || [[word:dhangunguzhush|dhangunguzhush]] || [[word:dhangunguzhu|dhangunguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanguzhuth|dhanguzhuth]] || [[word:dhanguzhuj|dhanguzhuj]] || [[word:dhanguzhush|dhanguzhush]] || [[word:dhanguzhu|dhanguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangufzhuth|dhangufzhuth]] || [[word:dhangufzhuj|dhangufzhuj]] || [[word:dhangufzhush|dhangufzhush]] || [[word:dhangufzhuf|dhangufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanguzhuthu|dhanguzhuthu]] || [[word:dhanguzhuju|dhanguzhuju]] || [[word:dhanguzhushu|dhanguzhushu]] || [[word:dhanguzhuku|dhanguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanguzhuth|dhanguzhuth]] || [[word:dhanguzhuj|dhanguzhuj]] || [[word:dhanguzhush|dhanguzhush]] || [[word:dhanguzhu|dhanguzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanguzhuthul|dhanguzhuthul]] || [[word:dhanguzhujul|dhanguzhujul]] || [[word:dhanguzhushul|dhanguzhushul]] || [[word:dhanguzhukul|dhanguzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanguzhuthuthu|dhanguzhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhanguzhujuju|dhanguzhujuju]] || [[word:dhanguzhushushu|dhanguzhushushu]] || [[word:dhanguzhuku|dhanguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanguzhuthun|dhanguzhuthun]] || [[word:dhanguzhujun|dhanguzhujun]] || [[word:dhanguzhushun|dhanguzhushun]] || [[word:dhanguzhukun|dhanguzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanguzhuthuoro|dhanguzhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhanguzhujuoro|dhanguzhujuoro]] || [[word:dhanguzhushuoro|dhanguzhushuoro]] || [[word:dhanguzhukuoro|dhanguzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
